title: Defiance (disambiguation)
content:
'''Defiance''' could refer to several things:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''''[[Obedience|Defiance]]''''', a [[cruiser]] later known as the ''Obedience''.
*'''''[[Defiance]]''''', an [[MC80A Home One Type Heavy Star Cruiser|MC80A ''Home One'' Type Heavy Star Cruiser]].

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*[[Defiance/Legends|'''''Defiance''''']], a [[MC80 Home One type Star Cruiser|''Home One'' type MC80 Star Cruiser]], which served the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] in the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].
*[[Defiance (MC90 Star Cruiser)|'''''Defiance''''']], an [[MC90 Star Cruiser]], which served the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] during and after the Reborn [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] [[Operation Shadow Hand]].
{{Disambig}}
